steps.title: Translate the minimum value
steps.content:
The phrase "8 times another number $n$" means $8n$. The phrase "15 less than" that amount means subtract $15$:
$$8n-15$$
This expression is the minimum possible value of $x$.

steps.title: Write the possible values
steps.content: If $8n-15$ is the minimum value, then $x$ can equal that value or be greater than it: $$x\ge 8n-15$$ The answer is B.
